housing.title: NVR is land light by design, Q2 2026 reveals the strategy has limits
housing.what: If you do not build it, they cannot come
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: High prices, hesitant demand weigh on June new home sales
housing.what: June Census data shows new home sales at a 628,000 annual pace, up 1.6% from May but down 5.6% year over year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Why homebuilders aren’t building more homes
housing.what: New home sales are staying in a 600,000 to 700,000 range, limiting permits as builders rely on rate buydowns.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Mortgage defaults level off in June, FHA new defaults down 15%
housing.what: ICE said June delinquency was 3.55% and FHA new defaults fell 15% year over year, while foreclosure inventory rose to 0.53%.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Congress didn’t create the private listings problem. We did.
housing.what: House letters to Compass and MRED seek an August 5 briefing on private listing networks, as calls grow for clearer MLS rules nationwide.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: From Bust to Boom: San Francisco Home Prices Are Now $1 Million Higher Than Housing-Crash Bottom
housing.what: San Francisco’s median home-sale price dropped to a low of $625,000 in the aftermath of the Great Recession; since then, it has risen over $1 million to more than $1.7 million
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Pending Home Sales Fall to 3-Month Low
housing.what: New listings inched up week over week, but they’re near their lowest level since the start of 2026
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Berkshire completes Taylor Morrison deal valued at $8.5B enterprise value
notables.what: Berkshire closed its Taylor Morrison acquisition at $72.50 per share, valuing equity at $6.8B and EV at $8.5B.
